The '''sound dampening stealth unit''',<ref name="KOTOR" /> also called an '''SD belt''',<ref name="KOTOR2" /> was a type of [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth belt]] that improved on the basic version. It worked by dampening all sounds made by the user, thus making them harder to detect. It was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] design, but was utilized by the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]. It could be bought from vendors across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for about two hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

By [[3951 BBY]], a model of the belt was manufactured by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]], and could be purchased for three hundred credits from vendors throughout the galaxy.<ref name="KOTOR2" />
